summary:
Perfect! The test now passes. The issue was the incorrect offset calculation in the pagination logic. The fix removes the unnecessary subtraction of 1 when `page > 1`, ensuring that:

- Page 1 shows items 0-9 (IDs 1-10)
- Page 2 shows items 10-19 (IDs 11-20)
- And so on...

This ensures there are no gaps or overlaps between pages.
